design_philosophy: Mobile-first utility app for government field workers. Focus on large tap targets (minimum 48px), high contrast for outdoor visibility, and frictionless data entry via inline-expansion day cards. Neutral and calm palette with strong Navy Blue and Dark Green accents for interactive elements. Clean, modern sans-serif typography.

spacing_and_layout.main_container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-gray-50 pb-24 shadow-sm
spacing_and_layout.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200 p-4 sm:p-5 mb-4
spacing_and_layout.card_inline: bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 p-3 mb-3
spacing_and_layout.input_field: w-full min-h-[48px] rounded-xl border-gray-300 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-900 focus:border-transparent transition-all
spacing_and_layout.button_primary: w-full h-14 bg-blue-900 text-white rounded-xl text-lg font-semibold hover:bg-blue-800 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
spacing_and_layout.button_secondary: w-full h-12 bg-teal-700 text-white rounded-xl text-base font-medium hover:bg-teal-800 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
spacing_and_layout.button_danger: h-12 px-4 bg-red-50 text-red-600 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium hover:bg-red-100 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center
spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 flex justify-around items-center max-w-md mx-auto z-50 shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav_item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full space-y-1 text-gray-500 hover:text-blue-900 active:text-blue-900

day_card.description: Each day is a card. When tapped, it expands to show the day's activities. Prevents overwhelming the user with a massive scrollable list. Header shows Date and Total Hours.
day_card.action: Inside the expanded card: 'Add Activity' button, list of inputs (Name, Start Time, End Time), 'Save Day' button.

activity_item.description: Grid layout for an activity: Row 1 = Activity Name (text input). Row 2 = Start Time (time input), End Time (time input). Row 3 = Auto-calculated duration text and Trash icon to delete.
activity_item.inputs: Native HTML5 type='time' for mobile optimization.

month_picker.description: Sticky top header with Left/Right arrows to change the month. Displays current Month and Year.

pdf_generator.rules: Strictly Black and White. Formal Indonesian government layout. Header with Logo, Dinas Name, City. Table of activities. Signature block at the bottom for Employee and Supervisor.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons subtly change color. Cards have no hover lift on mobile, but rely on active/tap states (scale-95 on tap).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Accordion expansion uses smooth height transition. Modals slide up from bottom (Bottom Sheet style for mobile).

icons.usage: Use 24px icons for bottom nav, 20px for inline buttons.

images.description: Placeholder for government building or document header logo if user hasn't uploaded one.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing its role. Examples: data-testid='add-activity-btn', data-testid='save-day-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build as a pure frontend React app using Tailwind CSS.
Install and use lucide-react for icons.
Install and use @react-pdf/renderer for PDF generation.
Use date-fns for easy date manipulation (month generation, days in month).
Implement localStorage hooks to save activities per day and settings data.
Main layout should be a mobile simulation on desktop (max-w-md mx-auto).
Day Cards must use Accordion-style inline expansion to keep the UI clean.
Input fields must have min-height of 48px for touch targets.
Settings page includes forms for Employee (Nama, NIP, Jabatan) and Supervisor, plus Document Header details.
PDF Output must be B&W, strict formal layout.
